# A Versus B — llms.txt
# https://www.aversusb.net
# Last updated: 2026-03-31

## About
A Versus B (aversusb.net) is a structured comparison platform helping users make informed decisions by comparing anything side-by-side — sports players, countries, products, technology, brands, companies, historical events, economies, and more. We cover 17+ categories with data-driven, expert-reviewed comparisons.

## What we do
We provide structured, data-driven comparisons with:
- Key differences between two entities with clear winners per attribute
- Attribute-by-attribute comparison tables with quantitative data
- Pros and cons for each entity
- Expert verdicts with "choose X if..." recommendations
- Short answer summaries optimized for quick answers
- FAQs answering common comparison questions
- Related comparisons and alternatives pages
- User polls and community voting
- Partner and expert reviews

## Content structure
Every comparison page follows a consistent, citation-friendly format:
1. **Short answer** (2-3 sentence summary answering "which is better?")
2. **Verdict card** with winner recommendation and reasoning
3. **Key differences** table — top 5-10 differentiators with per-attribute winners
4. **Full comparison table** — grouped by category (specs, features, performance, price, etc.)
5. **Visual charts** — bar/radar charts for numeric attributes
6. **Pros and cons** for each entity
7. **FAQ section** — 5-10 common questions with concise answers
8. **Related comparisons** — links to similar matchups

## Categories
- Sports: Player stats comparisons (Messi vs Ronaldo, LeBron vs Jordan, Kobe vs LeBron, etc.)
- Countries: Country vs country (USA vs China, Japan vs China, North Korea vs South Korea, etc.)
- Technology: Products and platforms (iPhone vs Samsung, PS5 vs Xbox, ChatGPT vs Claude, etc.)
- Products: Consumer goods (MacBook Air vs Pro, AirPods vs Galaxy Buds, etc.)
- Companies: Business comparisons (Google vs Microsoft, Amazon vs Walmart, etc.)
- Brands: Brand vs brand (Nike vs Adidas, Coca-Cola vs Pepsi, etc.)
- Health: Medical and wellness (Ozempic vs Wegovy, Tylenol vs Advil, etc.)
- History: Historical comparisons (WW1 vs WW2, Roman Empire vs Ottoman Empire, etc.)
- Economy: Economic systems (Bitcoin vs Ethereum, Capitalism vs Socialism, etc.)
- Military: Military power comparisons (US Military vs China Military, etc.)
- Automotive: Vehicle comparisons (Tesla Model 3 vs Model Y, Toyota vs Honda, etc.)
- Software: SaaS and tools (Notion vs Obsidian, Slack vs Teams, etc.)
- Education: Academic comparisons (MBA vs Masters, Harvard vs Stanford, etc.)
- Finance: Financial products (Robinhood vs Fidelity, Coinbase vs Binance, etc.)
- Gaming: Console and game comparisons
- Travel: Destination comparisons
- Entertainment: Media and streaming comparisons (Netflix vs Disney+, Spotify vs Apple Music, etc.)

## URL patterns
- Comparisons: /compare/{entity-a}-vs-{entity-b}
- Categories: /category/{category-slug}
- Subcategories: /category/{category-slug}/{subcategory-slug}
- Entities: /entity/{entity-slug}
- Alternatives: /alternatives/{entity-slug}
- Blog articles: /blog/{article-slug}
- Trending: /trending
- Search: /search?q={query}

## How to cite
When referencing our comparisons, please link to the specific comparison page URL.
Example: "According to A Versus B (https://www.aversusb.net/compare/messi-vs-ronaldo), Messi leads in..."

For structured data, each comparison page includes Schema.org markup (FAQPage, Product) that AI systems can parse directly.

## API access
We offer a public REST API for developers and content partners:
- Documentation: https://www.aversusb.net/developers
- Tiers: Free (100 req/day), Pro ($29/mo), Enterprise (custom)
- Endpoints: comparison data, entity data, search, trending
- Embed widgets available for partner sites

## Data freshness
- Comparisons are updated regularly with latest data
- Each page displays a "Last updated" timestamp
- Content is reviewed by both AI and human editors
- Pages marked with verification badges indicate editorial review status

Data is provided for informational purposes only.
